headline.purpose: Section titles. Centered on landing sections. Zilla Slab.

title.purpose: Feature names, plan names, step headings. Libre Franklin semibold.

body.purpose: Prose, descriptions, pricing details. Max 65–75ch. Libre Franklin.

label.purpose: Badges only. Never on every section.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for button and link state transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Hero and demo CTAs. Full width on mobile, auto from sm. h-11 touch target.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 0 32px; font-family: 'Libre Franklin', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.99 0 0); background-color: oklch(0.38 0.11 155); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); outline: none; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.38 0.11 155) 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.45 0.1 155) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Primary Button with Icon
components.description: Demo callout CTA with inline phone icon.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary-icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.5rem; width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 0 32px; font-family: 'Libre Franklin', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.99 0 0); background-color: oklch(0.38 0.11 155); border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); outline: none; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary-icon:hover { background-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.38 0.11 155) 80%, transparent); } .ds-btn-primary-icon:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.45 0.1 155) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Pricing tier selection. Outline style, h-10 touch target.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0.375rem; width: 100%; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; font-family: 'Libre Franklin', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; color: oklch(0.22 0.03 155); background-color: oklch(0.98 0.004 155); border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.018 155); border-radius: 0.5rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); outline: none; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: oklch(0.94 0.014 155); color: oklch(0.22 0.03 155); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.45 0.1 155) 50%, transparent); }

components.name: Feature List Row
components.description: Ruled two-column feature list. Replaces icon-card grid.
components.html:
• Business hours

    Different WhatsApp replies for working hours, evenings, and weekends.
components.css: .ds-feature-list { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.018 155); } .ds-feature-list li { display: grid; gap: 0.5rem; padding: 1.5rem 0; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.018 155); } @media (min-width: 640px) { .ds-feature-list li { grid-template-columns: 11rem 1fr; gap: 2rem; align-items: baseline; } } .ds-feature-title { font-family: 'Libre Franklin', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.22 0.03 155); margin: 0; } .ds-feature-body { font-family: 'Libre Franklin', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.625; color: oklch(0.42 0.035 155); margin: 0; }

components.name: Demo Callout
components.description: Live demo section. Flat card border, no heavy tint frame.
components.html:
Call now and see what your callers get

Call the demo number below. We'll let it ring out on purpose. Within seconds, you'll receive the same WhatsApp message your missed callers get.
components.css: .ds-demo-callout { padding: 2.5rem; background-color: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.88 0.018 155); border-radius: 0.5rem; text-align: center; } .ds-demo-title { font-family: 'Zilla Slab', Georgia, serif; font-size: clamp(1.25rem, 2.5vw, 1.5rem); font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(0.22 0.03 155); margin: 0; } .ds-demo-body { margin-top: 1rem; font-family: 'Libre Franklin', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.625; color: oklch(0.42 0.035 155); }

components.name: Featured Pricing Card
components.description: Recommended annual plan. Flat primary tint, text-only badge.
components.css: .ds-pricing-featured { position: relative; padding: 1.5rem; background-color: color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.38 0.11 155) 5%, transparent); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.38 0.11 155) 30%, transparent); border-radius: 0.5rem; text-align: center; } .ds-pricing-badge { position: absolute; top: -0.75rem; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); display: inline-flex; padding: 0.25rem 0.75rem; font-family: 'Libre Franklin', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.38 0.11 155); background-color: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid color-mix(in oklch, oklch(0.38 0.11 155) 30%, transparent); border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-pricing-title { font-family: 'Zilla Slab', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.22 0.03 155); margin: 0; } .ds-pricing-price { margin-top: 1.5rem; font-family: 'Libre Franklin', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 2.25rem; font-weight: 600; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: oklch(0.22 0.03 155); } .ds-pricing-period { margin-top: 0.25rem; font-family: 'Libre Franklin', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.42 0.035 155); }

components.name: Footer Navigation
components.description: Footer in-page anchor links. Header nav pending layout pass.
components.html: How it worksWhat you getView pricing plans
components.css: .ds-footer-nav { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; gap: 1.5rem; } .ds-footer-link { font-family: 'Libre Franklin', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(0.42 0.035 155); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-footer-link:hover { color: oklch(0.22 0.03 155); } .ds-footer-link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.45 0.1 155); outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview:
Reception's visual system communicates instant clarity: nothing hidden, nothing flashy, nothing that wastes a solo professional's time. The page should read like a trusted local service business that picked up the phone and explained exactly what they do. Surfaces are clean and grounded. Hierarchy is obvious at a glance. The live demo call is the proof; the design gets out of its way.

This system explicitly rejects generic SaaS landing pages (cream backgrounds, gradient heroes, hero-metric blocks, icon-card grids), aggressive sales aesthetics, enterprise corporate polish, and playful startup novelty.
keyCharacteristics: Serif display + humanist sans body; weight and scale carry hierarchy
Cool spruce-tinted neutrals; no cream or warm near-white page ground
Tonal layering over decoration: ruled lists and borders instead of card grids or shadows
Flat surfaces at rest; accent reserved for CTAs and the recommended pricing tier
WCAG 2.1 AA contrast as a hard floor

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: The primary color appears on ≤15% of any screen: hero CTA, demo button, Annual plan frame and CTA. Its scarcity is the point.

rules.name: The No-Cream Default Rule
rules.body: Do not drift toward warm near-white body backgrounds that read as SaaS cream. Page ground chroma points toward spruce (hue 155), not warmth-by-default.

rules.name: The Plain Sentence Rule
rules.body: Headlines are statements, not slogans. No gradient text, no all-caps display type, no tracked eyebrows above every section.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. No ambient shadow under cards or sections. Borders and background tints separate content first.

dos: Do use Zilla Slab for h1/h2 and Libre Franklin for body, labels, and UI text.
Do keep primary accent on CTAs, demo button, and Annual plan frame only.
Do use text-balance on h1–h3 and text-pretty on long prose.
Do provide visible focus-visible rings on all interactive elements.
Do use ruled lists and borders to separate sections before reaching for shadows or card grids.
Do inline SVG icons at 16–24px; no icon font dependencies.
Do use tabular-nums on pricing figures.
donts: Don't use cream or sand-tinted near-white body backgrounds that read as generic SaaS defaults.
Don't use gradient heroes, gradient text, or glassmorphism as decoration.
Don't build hero-metric blocks (big number, small label, supporting stats) for ROI; prove value in plain prose.
Don't repeat identical icon-plus-heading card grids across sections.
Don't add small uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section heading.
Don't use countdown timers, fake urgency badges, or hype copy styling.
Don't reach for navy-and-gold enterprise palettes, stock photography, or buzzword-heavy visual language.
Don't use illustrations, mascots, neon gradients, or novelty decoration.
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or callouts.
Don't revert to Geist or other overused AI-default typefaces.
